element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Speed vs. power tradeoff: weak attacks fast/low damage, medium balanced, strong slow/high damage
Directional blocking mechanic (away for high, down-away for low)
Close-range unblockable attacks using medium/strong punch + direction
Resource management: special moves drain meter, recharge via defensive shell, opponent can taunt to drain your meter
Each character has unique button combinations (no rolling motions; charge or multi-button presses)
Triggered by consecutive hits; opponent can land guaranteed free attack
Environmental kills triggered by positioning opponent in specific ground areas; story-irrelevant but gameplay reward

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based intensity with meter-gated special moves creating rhythm of aggression and repositioning; tournament structure (arcade mode) provides macro-level pacing through successive opponent encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational: players learn basic attack types (weak/medium/strong), blocking directions, and meter management against cooperative difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Intermediate: introduction of grapples, character-specific special moves, and dizziness mechanics; opponent AI uses special moves strategically
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced: tournament opponents employ full move arsenal; special meter depletion forces tactical repositioning; Overkill positioning becomes critical
notable_spikes: First special move encounter (meter management shock)
Final tournament matches with full AI capability and zero-meter specials

notable_level_patterns.description: Arcade mode presents sequential 1v1 matches against different characters from different time periods (1899-2030 A.D.). Each victory unlocks character-specific epilogue revealing how winner avoided death.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tournament Mode - progressive difficulty through 9-character roster

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage contains defined ground areas where Overkill finishing moves trigger. Positioning opponent correctly initiates background-based environmental kill.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All tournament stages feature stage-specific Overkill mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Special Attack Meter gates access to projectiles and special moves. Players must manage meter through charging/defensive shells, creating decision points between aggressive play and repositioning.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All matches feature meter depletion/recharge cycles
